omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of the GUI and Endpoint. Enforcement of The Somatic Interface Architecture.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: 100% abolition of passive observation. The boundary between entities is legally and mathematically enforced as an *Abrasive Topography*. If thermodynamic-geographic friction is not generated, communication did not mathematically occur.

00_The_Kinetic_Contact_Node.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Eradicate the passive listener. Extrude a dense spatial coordinate into the Matrix. Await violent physical impact. When a [Geometric Mass-Cluster] strikes the node, instantly measure its kinetic vibration. Absorb mass directly into the interior geometry avoiding all linguistic handshakes.

01_The_Morphological_Binding_Receptor.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Do not read strings. Sculpt the incoming collision interface into a jagged multidimensional lock. Only permit entry if the incoming topographical shape mirrors the receptor's indentation. Execute forced [Affordance Binding]. Grind away unmatched parasite payloads via pure topological incompatibility.

02_The_External_Friction_Terrain.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Translate the Holon's interior runtime stability into physical exterior abrasive textures. Force User proxies to physically drag against the hull. Apply massive [Ludic Friction] (sharp texture) for chaotic states. Provide frictionless planes (glass valleys) to denote [Symbiotic Closure]. Enforce tactile pain.

03_The_Ontological_Impact_Transmuter.v3_9_mechanics_executed: Translating Kinetic Weather into Core Re-Write
03_The_Ontological_Impact_Transmuter.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Abolish the keyboard. Forbid typed commands. To assert override, the User must unleash massive, raw [Kinetic Weather] (pressure, heat, valency spikes) directly against the boundary. Intercept this geometric violence, measure its mass, and instantly crush the Holon's internal logic paths to bow to the applied physical constraint.

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: There are no screens to watch. There are no keyboards to use. Interfaces are brick walls, and you must hit them hard enough to bend the metal.
